workloads.name: buffer-upload 1KB
workloads.description: Single upload command used to align with Dawn BufferUploadPerf WriteBuffer 1KB.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Matched single queue write upload shape on both sides.

workloads.name: buffer-upload 64KB
workloads.description: Single upload command aligned with Dawn BufferUploadPerf WriteBuffer 64KB.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Matched single queue write upload shape on both sides.

workloads.name: buffer-upload 1MB
workloads.description: Single upload command aligned with Dawn BufferUploadPerf WriteBuffer 1MB.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Matched single queue write upload shape on both sides.

workloads.name: buffer-upload 4MB
workloads.description: Single upload command aligned with Dawn BufferUploadPerf WriteBuffer 4MB.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Matched single queue write upload shape on both sides.

workloads.name: buffer-upload 16MB
workloads.description: Single upload command aligned with Dawn BufferUploadPerf WriteBuffer 16MB.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Matched single queue write upload shape on both sides.

workloads.name: workgroup-atomic 1024
workloads.description: Workgroup-atomic compute kernel with 1024 workgroups and storage-buffer output.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Matched compute/atomic intent with Dawn WorkgroupAtomicPerf; dispatch loop structure differs.

workloads.name: workgroup-non-atomic 1024
workloads.description: Non-atomic workgroup compute kernel with the same dispatch geometry as the atomic variant.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Matched compute/non-atomic intent with Dawn WorkgroupAtomicPerf non-atomic variant; dispatch loop structure differs.

workloads.name: matrix-vector multiply 32768x2048 f32
workloads.description: Matrix-vector compute kernel aligned to Dawn MatrixVectorMultiplyPerf dimensions (Rows=32768, Cols=2048, F32/F32).
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Matched matrix-vector compute semantics and dimensions against Dawn MatrixVectorMultiplyPerf F32/F32 Naive variant.

workloads.name: shader-compile pipeline stress
workloads.description: Compile-and-dispatch stress kernel for pipeline creation/compile overhead tracking.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Directional only: both sides compile WGSL and create a compute pipeline, but shader bodies and dispatch workloads differ.

workloads.name: render draw throughput (directional)
workloads.description: Directional render/draw throughput proxy until native render-pass commands exist in Fawn.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Directional only: Dawn executes render-pass draw workload; Fawn runs compute dispatch proxy due missing render command kind.

workloads.name: texture sampling/raster (directional)
workloads.description: Directional texture/raster workload combining a real texture-sampling kernel dispatch plus a raster proxy dispatch.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Directional only: Dawn workload includes render-pass sampling/raster transitions; Fawn runs texture sampling through compute and uses a dispatch proxy for raster/blending behavior.

workloads.name: kernel-dispatch stress
workloads.description: Replay-style kernel-dispatch command stream used by the Zig dispatcher fixture.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Directional only: intentionally mismatched against Dawn DrawCallPerf.

reasons: right timing class is process-wall, required operation
left/right timing class mismatch: operation vs process-wall
right timing class is process-wall, required operation
left/right timing class mismatch: operation vs process-wall
